transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-15]
[00:00] You: Legal compliance review — we need to address the GDPR and CCPA gaps identified in the audit.
[00:45] Speaker 1: Starting with GDPR: we need a data processing agreement template for our EU vendors. I'll draft that by July 22nd.
[01:20] Speaker 2: The consent management system is outdated. I'll update the cookie consent banner to comply with current GDPR standards — I'll have the updated implementation deployed by July 25th.
[02:00] Speaker 3: For CCPA, we still need the data deletion endpoint. I'll implement that API endpoint by July 29th.
[02:35] You: We also need to update our privacy policy to reflect both sets of changes. Speaker 1, can you own that?
[02:50] Speaker 1: I'll update the privacy policy draft and get it to legal review by July 30th.
[03:20] Speaker 4: The audit also flagged our data retention schedule. Currently we're keeping user data indefinitely. I'll update the automated deletion jobs to enforce our retention policy — 90 days for inactive users — by August 5th.
[04:00] Speaker 2: We also need to update the user-facing data export feature to include all data categories. Currently it's missing profile preferences and activity logs. I'll fix that by July 29th.
[04:40] You: Good. Speaker 3, can you document the full data flow for the DPA?
[04:55] Speaker 3: I'll create a data flow diagram showing all third-party data transfers by July 24th.
[05:20] Speaker 4: I should also check that all our third-party integrations have current DPAs on file. I'll audit that by July 22nd.
[05:50] You: Great. We need to be audit-ready by August 10th. Speaker 1, can you schedule a re-audit call with the external auditors?
[06:05] Speaker 1: I'll schedule the re-audit call with the external auditors for the week of August 10th by end of this week.
